RBI/2023-24/129 
DoS.CO.ARG/SEC.11/08.91.001/2023-24 March 01, 2024 

The Chairman / Managing Director / Chief Executive Officer, 
All Commercial Banks (Excluding RRBs) 
All Primary (Urban) Co-operative Banks (UCBs) 

Madam / Dear Sir, 

Review of Guidelines - Withdrawal of Circulars 

Consequent upon review of Circulars issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time, 
it has been decided to withdraw Circulars listed in the Annex with immediate effect. 

Yours faithfully, 

(Rajnish Kumar) 
Chief General Manager 
Encl: As above
